channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire After Pakistan's Diplomatic Push Amid Inflation Fears
item.description:
Trump extended the Iran ceasefire indefinitely on Pakistan's diplomatic request, as new polls show Americans increasingly blaming the ongoing conflict for rising consumer prices.

Key points:
• Trump announced the indefinite ceasefire extension on Truth Social, citing Iran's "seriously fractured" government and a formal request from Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munir.
• The U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports remains in effect; Iran's Foreign Minister called it "an act of war," while Trump says Iran is losing roughly $500 million per day.
• Peace talks remain stalled — VP JD Vance's planned trip to Islamabad was put on hold after Iran rebuffed efforts to restart negotiations, with no unified Iranian proposal yet submitted.
• U.S. consumer prices surged 3.3% annually in March — driven by a 21.2% spike in gas prices — and the University of Michigan's Consumer Sentiment Index fell to an all-time low of 47.6, with consumers widely blaming the Iran conflict.

Read the full article: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire After Pakistan's Diplomatic Push Amid Inflation Fears

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
